description: Guides agents to perform zero-downtime schema refactoring, index creation, and data migrations on the live Home Guardian database.

execution_pipeline.name: Acquire Integrity Baseline
execution_pipeline.description: Scan SQLite structure using PRAGMA integrity_check to verify the database file is clean and free of corruption blocks.

execution_pipeline.name: Audit Table Definitions
execution_pipeline.description: Fetch raw table SQL DDL representations to check for the existence of required fields before altering tables.
execution_pipeline.action: sqlite3 wifi_guardian.db "SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';"

execution_pipeline.name: Execute Incremental Migrations
execution_pipeline.description: Safely run ALTER TABLE statements in transactional blocks, ensuring indexes are built asynchronously to avoid table locking issues during active telemetry polling.
execution_pipeline.action: sqlite3 wifi_guardian.db "BEGIN TRANSACTION; ALTER TABLE ...; COMMIT;"
